prompt: A Chinese restaurant menu poster with a solid black background and golden decorative borders. At the top, in large bold letters, the heading says “Today’s Specials.” The appetizers section lists: “Spring Rolls – ¥18,” “Dumplings – ¥22,” “Hot and Sour Soup – ¥20.” The main dishes section displays in larger text: “Kung Pao Chicken – ¥45,” “Braised Beef – ¥55,” “Eggplant in Garlic Sauce – ¥38.” At the bottom, the desserts section reads: “Sesame Balls – ¥25,” “Mango Pudding – ¥28.” All menu items are written in clear white letters against the black background, with the prices shown directly beside each dish.
